meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality client work fast.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for clients to hand you work. Use Antigravity to scaffold high-fidelity mockups and Claude Code to automate your technical implementation. By building three 'dream client' projects in a single weekend, you transform a blank resume into a high-converting portfolio that proves your technical authority immediately.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is a paradox: you can't land clients without a portfolio, but you can't build a portfolio without clients. This 'chicken-and-egg' cycle kills more careers before they start than any lack of actual skill. You are standing on the precipice of a breakthrough where your output speed is no longer the bottleneck.

We are shifting the paradigm from 'waiting for opportunity' to 'engineering your own success.' By leveraging AI-assisted development, you can generate production-grade case studies in hours, not months. It is time to stop apologizing for your lack of experience and start showing the world what you are capable of building.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Niche
steps.description: Identify a specific industry problem you can solve. Don't build generic sites; build solutions for high-ticket clients like boutique gyms or local law firms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project brief for a high-converting landing page for a local premium fitness studio. Include sections for memberships, trainer bios, and a lead capture form.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a project folder named fitness-site and initialize a Next.js project with Tailwind CSS.'

steps.title: Architect the UI/UX
steps.description: Use AI to define your design tokens, color palette, and component hierarchy to ensure a professional, cohesive look.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a design system configuration (colors, spacing, typography) for a modern, high-end fitness brand. Provide the Tailwind config code.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply these design tokens to the global.css and tailwind.config.js files.'

steps.title: Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Build the core UI blocks. Focus on responsiveness and clean code structure so the site looks premium on all devices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the React code for a responsive hero section and a feature grid component using Shadcn UI patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the hero section and feature grid in the components directory using the provided Tailwind classes.'

steps.title: Integrate Backend Logic
steps.description: Add functionality like form submissions or API calls to prove you can build more than just pretty static pages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function to handle form submissions and send data to an email service like Resend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create an API route at /api/contact to process form data and integrate with the Resend SDK.'

steps.title: Deploy and Document
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and write a compelling README that highlights your technical decisions. This is your case study.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional case study README for this project, focusing on technical challenges solved and the impact on user conversion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a comprehensive README.md that details the tech stack, features, and deployment process.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Technical Challenges' section in your README to show you understand complex problem-solving.
Use AI to generate realistic placeholder data; generic 'lorem ipsum' makes your portfolio look amateur.
Prioritize mobile-first design; clients judge your work primarily on their phones during the initial discovery phase.
Record a 60-second Loom video walking through the code and the final product to build instant trust with prospects.
Focus on one 'hero' feature per project to avoid scope creep and keep the code clean for potential employers to inspect.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, deploy it to Vercel, link it to your GitHub profile, and reach out to three potential clients in that specific niche with a personalized video audit of their current site.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a world-class portfolio in record time. Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
